title: Deliciously Char Grilled Jamaican Chicken Skewers
description: A briny and springy Jamaican dish featuring char-grilled chicken skewers, perfect for a sick day, made with whole milk and gluten-free friendly ingredients, cooked on a comal.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together whole milk, soy sauce, brown sugar, grated ginger, jamaican jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a comal or grill over medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the comal or grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Place the skewers on the comal or grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through and slightly charred.
Serve the char grilled chicken skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
